evidence.role: Current employee - Senior Systems Software Engineer
evidence.text: Excellent benefits with good average work life balance. Very stable work environment versus other major tech companies. Nvidia has strong fundamentals and is always focused on the actual tech. Also the stock has been doing very well to so total comp for the last 5 years has been excellent. Good benefits, stable employment, solid technical challenges and average work-life balance

You can meet great collegues and if you are lucky with management you can have a freedom to work on the topics you consider interesting and important with little pressure and change of direction every few months. Great work/life balance. And of course you can publish your work even in ML/robotics areas. Good company overall, but a lot depends on the team. Great work/life balance. Compensation and bureaucracy issues.
1) Top quality of work in static timing analysis 2) Total compensation is good. Great Quality of work but poor work life balance
- Great work life balance - Fulfilling work - Great work culture, surrounded by smart people Great work life balance
Work life balance is good but sometimes work will be more Work life balance

This company and team offer a challenging environment with genuine impact. They encourage you to be flexible, bring forward suggestions, and test your limits. You'll gain substantial learning opportunities. challenging place wo work for
There is a strong culture of recognizing and rewarding employees for their hard work, further contributing to a positive work environment Positive Team Environment
Supportive team, stable work environment, and consistent workflow experience. "Supportive culture, but room for improvement"
Good work environment, supportive team, clear goals, learning exposure, and consistent target growth. Supportive Environment
Leadership promotes open communication and collaboration, creating a fun and engaging work culture Welcoming from Day One
Very Good pay and benefits Good pay
High salary, very good stocks options Good salary and benefits
Pto RSU bonus Salary Team work Great pay, benefits, PTO
Good base, decent stocks, good benefits Great benefits
good company great benefits great leadership good company great benefits
Stock growth only plus point Ceo is caring Fixed Mindset, No growth, Sucks life out

- Constant and consistent feedback - Collaboration with multiple teams, both in HR and in Engineering - Shared sense of success and learnings with collaboration partners - Great benefits and resources - Flexibility in many aspects to make sure that I feel taken care of - CEO talks the talk and also walks the walk - Career growth and development is valued and supported Fulfilling & Exciting

Founder led company with real concern and care for employees. We've never had a real layoff in the 20 years I have been with the company. Jensen is visionary leader. Management has been very supportive of my personal career growth and work flexibility. Job is never dull, always new challenges. NVIDIA is a great place to make a career
Work From Home Is only Pros here No Career Growth

evidence.role: Former employee - Shipping and Receiving Specialist
evidence.text: Learned so much with hands on experience and people were very supportive. Learned a lot
Leadership development programs emphasize the importance of ethical decisionmaking, empowering leaders to lead with integrity Amazing Support System

It's a fast-moving, highly technical work environment. There's no worry about getting bored. There are lots of opportunities to take on more responsibilities and to advance. Employees are well-compensated and there are very good benefits. Movement within the company, after a reasonable amount of time, is encouraged and is, in fact, the norm. After 8 years at NVIDIA, it's clear that the culture of honesty, accountabi...
-Best in class products -Employee Stock Purchase Plan -Benefits at 100% coverage Great company with poor management
Amazing culture, thrive on inclusion and leadership outstanding Great company, respectful HR
There are abundant opportunities for career development, including training programs and mentorship, enabling employees to grow and progress Respectful Work Atmosphere
Not spread across many locations in India Competitive pay and benefits, no active layoffs

evidence.role: Current employee - Software Development Engineer In Test (SDET)
evidence.text: Work pressure is little high some times Excellent work culture
Alot of work and stress Stressful but pays off
- Not many benefits - Sometimes long hours - Open Space - A lot of pressure all the time Work experience
the company doesn't push you for growth Overall good

No work life balance worst company to work. No compoff for working on weekends or no extra pay. No need of new rules by govt 14hrs work policy already we are working like that. No work life balance worst company to work.

occasional overnight or early morning meetings there will be period in year when you have to forget work life balance not best place for NCG to join, in today's condition this may not be true. with AI you may not need skills you would not have missed out on being NCG at NVIDIA. Good Place to Work
did not find any up to now. Nice company to work

evidence.role: Current employee - Data Center Security Manager
evidence.text: Depending on the duration of the leave you may have a lot to catch up on Great work life balance
I don't see any cons whatsoever Work-life balance

Increased responsibilities without clear path for career growth Increased stress and aggressive management No parking, expensive food Unlimited vacation = no vacation Growing company without growth for its employees
Low hikes and work like balance is not good Decent place to work
None that I can think of. Great place to work
Not a typical sales enviroment. Very developer, engineer, and data scientist focused company Not for sales

It's not easy starting out as a new employee right after graduation, especially in a fast-paced environment. Without prior experience â whether it's a PhD or a few years in the industry â itâs easy to feel overwhelmed by the expectations and complexity of the work. That said, the same challenge can also be a great opportunity. If you're a well-trained engineer with a strong foundation, you get the chance to wo...
Food is not much good at Taipei office Good culture and colleagues
don't have a specific con nvidia
Low yearly compensation update. No social events. Review by a Verification Engineer
Frugal culture, so flights, for example, are not in business class. Promotion pace can be slow sometimes My best employer so far
Slow climb on career ladder. If you are seeking to cimb up the ladder fast, NVIDIA might not be the ideal place. CEO is a rock star, company encourages collaboration
A bit of politics, wannabe-open culture, so on Some politics
The recruiting team is full of toxic women especially talent programs Toxic
There is politics, some teams better than others, some favoritism and managers taking advantage. Best place to work!
No clear strategy and toxic working culture Toxic culture
Don't expect job security if you are on contract Go for the experience
